name: fx-telarana
description: Forex Telaraña Protocol — decentralized cross-currency money market and FX engine on Arc

scripts.contracts:test: cd contracts && forge build --force test/MorphoArtifacts.t.sol && forge test --no-match-contract MainnetForkTest
scripts.contracts:size:guard: cd contracts && forge build && for f in out/FxSwapHook.sol/FxSwapHook.*.json out/FxHubMessageReceiver.sol/FxHubMessageReceiver.*.json out/FxMarketRegistry.sol/FxMarketRegistry.*.json out/FxLiquidator.sol/FxLiquidator.*.json out/FxGatewayHook.sol/FxGatewayHook.*.json out/FxOracle.sol/FxOracle.*.json out/FxRouter.sol/FxRouter.*.json; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; size=$(jq -r '.deployedBytecode.object | length / 2' "$f"); name=$(basename "$f"); if [ "$size" -gt 24576 ]; then echo "FAIL $name = $size > 24576 (EIP-170)"; exit 1; else echo "ok   $name = $size"; fi; done
scripts.contracts:test:fork: cd contracts && forge build --force test/MorphoArtifacts.t.sol && ETH_RPC_URL=https://ethereum-rpc.publicnode.com forge test
scripts.contracts:smoke:basket: cd contracts && forge build --force test/MorphoArtifacts.t.sol && forge test --match-contract AvalancheBasketSmokeTest
scripts.hyperlane:arc:test-dispatch: npx @hyperlane-xyz/cli send message --registry https://github.com/hyperlane-xyz/hyperlane-registry --registry ./hyperlane/registry --origin arctestnet --destination fuji --body fx-telarana-arc-hyperlane-dispatch --quick --yes
scripts.hyperlane:fuji:test-message: npx @hyperlane-xyz/cli send message --registry https://github.com/hyperlane-xyz/hyperlane-registry --registry ./hyperlane/registry --origin fuji --destination arctestnet --body fx-telarana-fuji-to-arc-smoke --relay --yes
